memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later.
It is unresolved which model is cheapest while saturating performance.

details: Recorded 2 unresolved questions with medium confidence.
No superseded or deleted facts were present.

repair_options: If desired, split the open questions into separate tracking cards for Telegram and model selection.
If desired, add explicit system roles for Brain DB, Cognee, and Slack in a shared ontology.
